title: helichrysum decrescentisquamatum
intro: Helichrysum decrescentisquamatum, also known as the yellow star, is a flowering plant species belonging to the sunflower family. It is native to the tropical regions of Africa and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Helichrysum decrescentisquamatum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
